productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Formal Maroon Tie+Cufflink+Pocket square - Combo Pack
description: For any special occasion, this accessory set comprising a silky microfibre tie, matching cuff-links and a silk handkerchief makes a perfect gift for the man of style and is every debonair charmer's dream. Tie Length: 150 cm Made of 100% microfibre Has diagonal stripes in brown, blue and chocolate One loop on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in place Cuff-links Width: 1 cm Matching round cuff-links made of steel Hinged back to hold the cuff link in place Handkerchief Square handkerchief with a 30 cm width Made of microfibre with a matching pattern Tie and handkerchief care Dry clean only
